method: Compute colour-contrast ratios for text and meaningful non-text UI components against their backgrounds and compare to WCAG thresholds (1.4.3 4.5:1 normal / 3:1 large text; 1.4.11 3:1 non-text).
expected_output: Per element: foreground/background colours, computed contrast ratio and pass/fail against the applicable threshold; fail list with selectors. Text over images may need human review.
